name: Advisor
description: Consult a stronger reviewer model for a second opinion — as an auto-review turn hook (toggle / `/advisor`) and as the model-callable `advisor__consult` tool, a declarative HTTP tool routed through Core's `/api/advisor/consult` bridge.

config.description: Consult a stronger advisor model for a second opinion. Call this BEFORE substantive work (before committing to an approach), when you are stuck, or before declaring a task done. The advisor reviews the question and context you provide and returns concrete, actionable advice. Give its advice serious weight. Returns { ok, model, advice }.

question.description: What you want advice on — your plan, the approach you are about to take, the bug you are stuck on, or the answer you are about to commit to.

context.description: Optional. The relevant details the advisor should review: your current plan, the code or answer in question, key constraints, and anything you have already tried. The advisor only sees what you put here, so include enough to judge.

model.description: Optional explicit advisor model id. Defaults to the configured 'advisor-model' preference, else the node default.

composer_controls.label: Advisor
composer_controls.description: Consult a stronger reviewer model on the full conversation after each answer.

slash_commands.description: Ask a stronger advisor model to review the whole conversation and advise. Add a focus, e.g. '/advisor is this the right approach?'.

turn_hooks.code:
const rev = ctx.transcript.slice().reverse(); const lastUser = rev.find(m => m.role === 'user'); const cmd = lastUser ? (lastUser.content || '').trim() : ''; const onDemand = cmd === '/advisor' || cmd.indexOf('/advisor ') === 0; const toggled = !!(ctx.flags && ctx.flags['com.ryuhq.advisor']); if (!onDemand && !toggled) { return { kind: 'none' }; } if (!ctx.transcript || ctx.transcript.length === 0) { return { kind: 'none' }; } const transcript = ctx.transcript.map(m => m.role + ': ' + m.content).join('

'); const focus = onDemand && cmd.length > 8 ? cmd.slice(9).trim() : ''; const system = 'You are a stronger reviewer advising a capable assistant. You can see the entire conversation. Before the assistant commits to an approach or declares the task done, give concrete, actionable advice: flag wrong assumptions, missing steps, better approaches, and risks. Be specific and brief. If the direction is already sound, say so in one line and add the single highest-value improvement. Advise; do not rewrite the answer for it.'; let prompt = 'Full conversation so far:

' + transcript; if (focus) { prompt += '

The assistant specifically wants advice on: ' + focus; } prompt += '

Give your advice now.'; const advice = await host.sideModel({ system: system, prompt: prompt, model_pref_key: 'advisor-model', effort: 'high' }); if (!advice || !advice.trim()) { return { kind: 'none' }; } if (onDemand) { return { kind: 'continue', text: 'An expert advisor reviewed the whole conversation and gave this advice. Give it serious weight and act on it in your next response:

' + advice.trim() }; } return { kind: 'note', text: 'Advisor: ' + advice.trim() };
